name: snooze_reminder
description: Snooze the most recently delivered reminder for a user, or mark it as done. Call this when the user says 'snooze Xh', 'snooze Xm', 'snooze', or 'done'/'dismiss' in response to a reminder DM. Finds the last sent/snoozed reminder and either reschedules it (snooze) or cancels it (done). Returns the updated trigger_at so you can confirm to the user.

user_id.description: User ID (UUID or username) whose last reminder to snooze/dismiss.

action.description: 'snooze' reschedules the reminder. 'done' cancels it permanently.

duration.description: How long to snooze: '1h', '30m', '2h', etc. Only used when action='snooze'. Defaults to '1h'.

new_trigger_at.description: New UTC ISO trigger time (null if done).

new_trigger_at_local.description: New trigger time in user's timezone.
